audit_items.proof_trace: When damon_select_ops() fails at line 439, damon_reclaim_init() returns -EINVAL without calling damon_destroy_ctx(ctx), leaking the allocated context. This contrasts with damon_lru_sort_init() which properly cleans up on the same error path.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Module load triggers damon_reclaim_init(); if DAMON_OPS_PADDR operations aren't registered, damon_select_ops() fails, causing memory leak of ctx allocation.
